body:
## Summary
- adapt the PvE frontend to consume the new backend socket-driven state machine
- add a socket-backed Zustand cache plus updated game flow hooks and pages
- separate player-resolve and boss-attack presentation timing with a resolve animation ack
- add backend PvE handler coverage and score logging after resolve
- check in the planning docs used for the frontend socket migration

## Testing
- backend: npm run test:unit
- frontend: node --test src/socket/pveSocketAdapter.test.js
- frontend: npm run build

## Notes
- backend npm run lint still fails on pre-existing branch issues such as unused vars and explicit anys outside this change set
title: feat: wire PvE frontend to socket state machine
